scripts.dev:frontend: concurrently -k -n web,backend,worker -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev -w web" "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start:worker -w backend"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -k -n backend,worker,web -c green,yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev:worker -w backend" "npm run start -w web"
